subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of God! The enclosed letters have been dispatched; do thou deliver them. In truth, there is absolutely no time to write to these youth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب بشیرالهی مکاتیب جوف ارسال گشت برسانید فی الحقیقه ابدا فرصت تحریر این جوانها
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
